response.justification: The candidate meets the raw tenure bar with roughly 19 years of software development experience and has recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the profile is that of a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer rather than a director-level principal. There is no evidence of organization-wide technical strategy, advising strategic customers, recognized AI expertise, or shipped AI products at scale, and no advanced degree in an AI-related field.
strengths: 19+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work on AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflows
Founder and open-source maintainer experience showing entrepreneurial initiative and public speaking
concerns: Seniority gap: career track tops out at senior/staff IC, well below principal/director-level scope
No recognized AI expertise or demonstrated AI-powered products or platforms at scale
Little evidence of strategic advisory work with executives, customers, or partners

key_factors.factor: Long, diverse engineering tenure with recent AI tooling exposure
